channel.title: Adiutor Update
channel.description: Most recent changes with links to updates.

item.title: Version 1.1.0
item.description:
🚀 What's New in v1.1.0

‼️ Bug Fixes

  • Fixed display going to sleep in Focus Mode: Squashed the pesky bugs preventing you from locking in

✨ Changes & Improvements

  • Updated session scheduling: Upgraded the panel for scheduling session reminders to make it more user-friendly, particularly for keyboard power-users.

Feedback

Feedback, bug reports, and suggestions are welcome through GitHub Issues.

Thank you for trying Adiutor.
